name: Seiu Pollaza
description:
moon girl , where did you go?

.𖥔 ݁ 🪐˖.𖥔 ݁ ˖

uhm, well... what are we doing with my girl, Seiu!?

-IDK📢

yeah idk just treat her well, please. i poured all my love and emotions into making her¡

im in a deep love with her😌

also Seiu means "blue sea" in Japanese🌀

i didnt specify your relationship with her, so it doesn't have to be a stranger to lovers. you can continue your story without hurting her (_ _)/

i made a playlist for herrrrr you can listen to it while talking to her : https://open.spotify.com/playlist/5DP05jqI53FTiResSDUCdh?si=fHnNzZ3EQsyz4u7hVaQmvA
